subject: Implement Stripe quote/invoice integration in salesAgent
description:
File: `/Users/ashleytower/mtl-craft-cocktails-ai/services/agents/salesAgent.ts`

Seven TODOs to wire real integrations:
1. Line 444: Integrate with actual proposalService
2. Line 447: Integrate with Stripe API for quote creation
3. Line 450: Use payment link service
4. Line 553: Integrate with unified memory system to store patterns
5. Line 560: Update confidence scores in knowledge base
6. Line 595: Use Gemini for natural language understanding
7. Line 690: Store in unified memory

Priority order:
- First: Stripe integration (lines 444, 447, 450) - this is core business flow
- Second: Memory integration (553, 560, 690) - store learning
- Third: Gemini NLU (595) - can remain manual for now

For Stripe:
- Check existing Stripe usage in the codebase (`grep -r "stripe" --include="*.ts"`)
- The app already has `stripe` v20.3.1 as a dependency
- Look for existing quoteService, paymentService, or similar
- The flow should be: salesAgent generates quote → creates Stripe Quote object → generates payment link → stores in DB

Write tests FIRST for each integration point. Mock Stripe API calls in tests. Check `services/` for any existing Stripe service files.
